import numpy as np
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Point2D:
    x: float
    y: float

@dataclass
class Pixel:
    r: int
    g: int
    b: int

def compute_distances(points_a: list[Point2D], points_b: list[Point2D]) -> list[float]:
    a_arr = np.array([(p.x, p.y) for p in points_a])
    b_arr = np.array([(p.x, p.y) for p in points_b])
    diff = a_arr - b_arr
    return np.sqrt((diff ** 2).sum(axis=1)).tolist()

def process_pixel_batch(pixels: list[Pixel]) -> list[int]:
    arr = np.array([(p.r, p.g, p.b) for p in pixels])
    weights = np.array([0.299, 0.587, 0.114])
    return (arr @ weights).astype(int).tolist()

def normalize_vertices(vertices: list[tuple[float, float, float]]) -> list[tuple[float, float, float]]:
    arr = np.array(vertices)
    lengths = np.sqrt((arr ** 2).sum(axis=1, keepdims=True))
    result = arr / lengths
    return [tuple(row) for row in result]
